channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 3 lime bikes out of bay, 21st April
item.description:
In close proximity

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96-98, Great Portland Street, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bridge, 21st April
item.description:
Graffiti on bridge (this bit got missed yesterday)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pritchards Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lower part of Rectory Lane nr All Saints Church to be swept, 21st April
item.description:
Lower part of Rectory Lane nr All Saints Church to be swept - caller says this has not been swept for a long while including the grass banks - needs attention asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Albert Road beside Carlton House 57-64, 21st April
item.description:
Massive Domestic and Diy flytips

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Terrace, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Black fridge on f/way o/s Rondel Court opp 1 Arbuthnot lane, 21st April
item.description:
Black fridge on f/way o/s Rondel Court opp 1 Arbuthnot lane, Bexley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Arbuthnot Lane, Bexley, Greater London

item.title: Dead squirrel on the street, 21st April
item.description:
Dead squirrel on the street, needs be removed before it blocks the street drain. Also a health risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St George's Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 21st April
item.description:
Please remove office chair and wood which has been fly tipped next to the old phone box.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bicknor Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clanking drain cover o/s Somerfield LodgeThe Green, Sidcup, 21st April
item.description:
Clanking drain cover o/s Somerfield LodgeThe Green, Sidcup - res has already reported this under ref no 92669624. She said it took the men 4 seconds to take off and 4 seconds to put back on, but the lady says this is still clanking especially over night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Green, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 21st April
item.description:
Some domestic rubbish has been dumped on the corner of Oswyth Road and Vestry Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and litter, 21st April
item.description:
Please remove fly tip and litter on grass area at end of Wye Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wye Close, Crofton, Greater London

item.title: 91 voctoria road, 21st April
item.description:
Small fly tip 91 victoria road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Blocked drain, 21st April
item.description:
The drain here is completely blocked with old blossom, leaves etc, as you can see from the photo. I imagine no rainwater would be able to get through so could lead to surface flooding in bad weather.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 57 victoria road, 21st April
item.description:
Fly tipping 57 victoria road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Penge, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipped door at junction of Melbourne Grove and Lytcott Grove SE22, 21st April
item.description:
Fly tipped door at Junction of Melbpourne Grove and Lytcott Grove SE22 outside small urban orchard, right underneath the No Fly Tipping sign!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 148, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pea shingle on pavement and road, 21st April
item.description:
Large amounts of pea shingle on pavement and road. Slip/ trip hazard to pedestrians
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broxbourne Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement in front of The Oaks, 25 Brondesbury Park Road, NW6 7BY, 21st April
item.description:
Glass bits, potentially from a broken window or screen have been at this location for over 2 weeks and could cause injuries. Please can the council support with the clean up?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Park, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
